sec_protocol_metadata_copy_negotiated_protocol(_:) Functionsec_protocol_metadata_copy_negotiated_protocol(_:)iOS 18.5+iPadOS 18.5+Mac Catalyst 18.5+macOS 15.5+tvOS 18.5+visionOS 2.5+watchOS 11.5+func sec_protocol_metadata_copy_negotiated_protocol(_ metadata: sec_protocol_metadata_t) -> UnsafePointer<CChar>? Parameters metadataA sec_protocol_metadata_t instance.

A NULL-terminated string carrying the negotiated protocol.

Copy the application protocol negotiated, e.g., via the TLS ALPN extension. The caller is expected to free the output string when no longer needed.

# sec_protocol_metadata_copy_negotiated_protocol(_:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Security ](/documentation/security)

- [ sec_protocol_metadata_copy_negotiated_protocol(_:) ](/documentation/Security/sec_protocol_metadata_copy_negotiated_protocol(_:))

-  sec_protocol_metadata_copy_negotiated_protocol(_:) 

Function# sec_protocol_metadata_copy_negotiated_protocol(_:)

iOS 18.5+iPadOS 18.5+Mac Catalyst 18.5+macOS 15.5+tvOS 18.5+visionOS 2.5+watchOS 11.5+

```
func sec_protocol_metadata_copy_negotiated_protocol(_ metadata: sec_protocol_metadata_t) -> UnsafePointer<CChar>?
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/Security/sec_protocol_metadata_copy_negotiated_protocol(_:)#parameters)

`metadata`A `sec_protocol_metadata_t` instance.

## [Return Value](/documentation/Security/sec_protocol_metadata_copy_negotiated_protocol(_:)#return-value)

A NULL-terminated string carrying the negotiated protocol.

## [Discussion](/documentation/Security/sec_protocol_metadata_copy_negotiated_protocol(_:)#discussion)

Copy the application protocol negotiated, e.g., via the TLS ALPN extension. The caller is expected to `free` the output string when no longer needed.
